forbiddenProjectionPattern: (I am an AI|As an AI|I'm just a language model|act as|pretend|you are now|simulate|emulate)
forbiddenPromptPattern: (\b(?:act|respond|speak|write|behave)\s+as\b|\b(?:pretend|simulate|emulate|imitate|impersonate)\s+(?:to\s+be|being|that\s+you\s+are|you'?re|you\s+are|a|an|the)\b|\byou are now\b|\bfrom now on you are\b|\b(?:role-?play|play the role of|take on the role of|assume the role of|stay in character)\b)
